packets.title: Survey of deep learning techniques for graph data: from continuous graph neural networks to topological deep learning

supporting_passages.summary: 1 Latest Articles | Ahead of Prints | Most Read Articles | --> Archives | In Press | Full Text --> --> --> --> https://doi.org/10.5351/KJAS.2025.38.5.589 그래프 데이터를 위한 딥러닝 기법 탐색:연속형 그래프 신경망부터 위상학적 신경망까지 Survey of deep learning techniques for graph data: from continuous graph neural networks to topological deep learning Korean J Appl Stat 2025;38(5):589-622 Published online October 31, 2025 © 2025 The Korean Statistical Society.

윤성민 a , 김형준 1,b , 신승준 a Seongmin Yun a , Hyoungjun Kim 1,b , Seung Jun Shin a a 고려대학교 통계학과; b 경북대학교 수학교육과 a Department of Statistics, Korea University; b Department of Mathematics Education, Kyungpook National University 1 Department of Mathematics Education, Kyungpook National University, Daegu 41566, Korea E-mail: kimhjun@knu.ac.kr This work was supported by the National Research Foundation of Korea (NRF) grant funded by the Korea governement (MSIT)(No.
Abstract Other Sections Abstract Reference 본 연구는 그래프 신경망(GNN)의 최신 동향인 연속형 GNN과 위상학적 신경망을 중심으로, 관련 이론과 다양한 모델을 정리한다.
